colleges.name: RV College of Engineering (UPDATED)
colleges.locationAddress: RV Vidyanikethan Post, Mysore Road, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560059
colleges.details: Established in 1963, RVCE is one of the earliest self-financing engineering colleges in the country. It is highly regarded for its excellent academic standard, rich culture, and stellar placement records in Karnataka.

colleges.name: PES University (PESU)
colleges.locationAddress: 100 Feet Ring Road, BSK III Stage, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560085
colleges.details: PES University is a prominent private university offering diverse courses in Engineering, Management, and Law. PESU is well known for its research-oriented approach and high-paying tech placements.

colleges.name: BMS College of Engineering (BMSCE)
colleges.locationAddress: Bull Temple Road, Basavanagudi, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560019
colleges.details: BMSCE is one of India's oldest private engineering schools, founded in 1946. Located in the heart of Bangalore, it hosts a vibrant campus with rich cultural and technical events, offering world-class labs.

colleges.name: M. S. Ramaiah Institute of Technology (MSRIT)
colleges.locationAddress: MSR Nagar, MSRIT Post, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560054
colleges.details: MSRIT is an autonomous private engineering college affiliated with VTU. Renowned for its state-of-the-art infrastructure, massive laboratory facilities, and top-tier industrial collaborations.

colleges.name: Siddaganga Institute of Technology (SIT)
colleges.locationAddress: SIT Campus, Bangalore-Honnavar Road, Tumakuru, Karnataka 572103
colleges.details: SIT is one of the premier technological institutes in Tumkur, Karnataka, offering affordable engineering education with exceptional placements, high discipline, and great sports facilities.

colleges.name: Atria Institute of Technology
colleges.locationAddress: ASKB Campus, 1st Main Rd, Ags Colony, Anandnagar, Hebbal, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560024
colleges.details: Atria Institute of Technology in Bengaluru offers a vibrant campus life with state-of-the-art facilities, fostering a culture of innovation and academic excellence. The campus is surrounded by lush greenery.

colleges.name: PES
colleges.locationAddress: 100 Feet Ring Road, BSK III Stage, Bangalore - 560085
colleges.details: PES University is a private university located in Bangalore, Karnataka. It has a beautiful campus with state-of-the-art infrastructure and modern facilities. The university is known for its academic excellence and has been ranked among the top private universities in India.
